scripts.build: pnpm prisma:generate && tsup src/index.ts --format esm --sourcemap --clean && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.test: node ../../scripts/with-test-db-schema.mjs databench_test_catalog pnpm prisma:generate && node ../../scripts/with-test-db-schema.mjs databench_test_catalog pnpm --dir ../.. exec prisma migrate deploy && node ../../scripts/with-test-db-schema.mjs databench_test_catalog vitest run --passWithNoTests
